title: [FIRRTL] Use WiringProblem to handle SFC wiring transform
body:
Quite a few mature codebases are still using Chisel's `BoringUtils` and the `firrtl.passes.wiring._` set of annotations to express cross-module references. 

It seems that with the introduction of WiringProblem. a reasonable way of handling these Annotations has come up. For example, I've had success tracking the defined Source/SinkAnnotations and their "pin" definitions in a custom annotation resolver and then emitting WiringProblems as needed.

The biggest question is probably if such a thing is needed at all (i.e. if it is preferable to use more specific transforms, similar to how `WireDFT` handles a specific case, or some other method of handling these has been looked at).
